experiance.title: Software Developer (Full Stack)
content: Built RTL REST APIs with PHPUnit TDD for casting workflows.
Managed RabbitMQ, Linux, and async queues to keep services in sync.
Cut slow SQL paths by ~60% with query tuning and memory tweaks.
Technologies: PHP 8+, JavaScript, MySQL, RabbitMQ, Git, Docker

experiance.title: Software Developer (Full Stack) - Working Student
content: Delivered operations tools for RTL, BILD, and Redseven broadcasters.
Built a talent portal plus REST API layer for media workflows.
Refreshed legacy MVC code with SOLID patterns for easier maintenance.
Migrated multiple apps from PHP 5/7 to PHP 8.3.
Technologies: PHP 8+, JavaScript, jQuery, CSS, Bootstrap, Git

experiance.title: Full-Stack Developer
content: Expanded a school management platform with new backend features.
Designed REST APIs to guide migration from legacy PHP to Laravel.
Technologies: PHP, Laravel, JavaScript, jQuery, CSS, Git, MySQL

Education.title: Master in Web and Data Science
content: Key subjects: Web Science, Engineering Web and Data Intensive Systems, Data Science, Machine Learning.
Master's Thesis: Fine-tuning LLMs for Irony Detection with Python and Hugging Face.

Education.title: Bachelor of Information Management (BIM)
content: Key subjects: Java Programming, Data Structure and Algorithm, DBMS, Software Engineering

projects.title: Event Management Application
content: Containerised event management system with an API-first Laravel backend, React frontend, and PostgreSQL database deployed via Docker Compose.

projects.title: Vedic Astro App
content: Built a Vedic astrology app that calculates planetary data and lets users chat with an AI assistant using chart-based knowledge.

projects.title: Chat with PDF
content: Developed an AI chatbot using the OpenAI API to answer questions and extract insights from PDF and DOC documents.

projects.title: Mini-PHP Framework
content: Lightweight custom framework with routing, authentication, CSRF protection, input validation, PDO database layer, and Twig templating to explore MVC internals.

projects.title: AI Meeting Minutes
content: End-to-end meeting transcription and summarisation system built with Whisper and an LLM, featuring a FastAPI backend, PostgreSQL storage, and React frontend.

projects.title: chat-pdf-hugginface
content: Fun Python project that chats about a PDF upload and generates a PDF transcript of the conversation.
